component.name: Hideaway
component.summary: Manage and hide your desktop applications

description.p: Hideaway is a clean, native GNOME utility that helps you declutter your app grid without uninstalling anything. Easily hide system applications you don't use, and restore them at any time with a single click.

ul.li: Browse all installed desktop applications in one place
Hide apps from the GNOME overview without removing them
Optionally move app files to a backup directory for full removal

screenshot.caption: Manage and restore applications with an intuitive interface.

ul.li: Cleaned and sanitized all developer, translator, and contributor credits to bazixv13
Flathub compliance renamed application namespace to io.github.bazixv13.Hideaway
Fixed a Python scope shadowing crash when opening the About window
Optimized sandbox permissions to resolve Flatpak path reservation warnings
Live search bar — filter apps by name or filename instantly
Virtualised list for smooth scrolling with hundreds of apps
App list now loads in the background so the window opens instantly
Full Flatpak sandbox support with host filesystem access
Hardware-accelerated rendering via DRI device access
